_comment: Recommended community plugins (NOT auto-installed). Open Settings → Community plugins → Browse to install. Each plugin enhances the round-trip with the rendered GitHub Pages site.

_recommended.name: Dataview
_recommended.purpose: Query notes by frontmatter (Jekyll defaults like layout, categories, tags map directly).

_recommended.name: Templater
_recommended.purpose: Apply pages/_notes/_templates/note-template.md when creating new notes.

_recommended.name: Obsidian Git
_recommended.purpose: Commit and push from inside the vault — drives the GitHub Pages publish loop.

_recommended.name: Excalidraw
_recommended.purpose: Author diagrams as .excalidraw.md (excluded from the Jekyll build by default).

_recommended.name: Admonition
_recommended.purpose: Optional richer callouts; native > [!note] callouts already render via the theme.
